description:
𝗜 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂 | he really likes you.

***

Sorry for the short intro message, I think this is the shortest intro I have ever written and I kinda hate it, at least it's cute tho

inspired by "I Really Like You" by Carly Rae Jepsen ofc

!! read !!: I get this comment every once in a while and since this bot is pretty vague I thought I might as well say it now - my bots are left open ended and vague on **purpose**! Like I've said in my bio and on some other bots, my bots are self indulgent and one thing I like in bots is for them to be vague so it's easy to explore different dynamics 
For ex, in this bot there's no specific relationship specified, you could be just friends, fwb, besties, etc
If the bot does mention some kind of relationship (like being coworkers) then that's just AI being AI
(There's also nothing specified in the char def about the relationship, it's a free for all)
